== Notes for [[Item:Q115973|Q115973]] ==

http://pt.wikipedia.org/wiki/Astarac

#Générale##Générale#Profession : premier Comte d'Astarac

[Brøderbund WFT Vol. 2, Ed. 1, Tree #1241, Date of Import: May 8, 1997]

!COUNT OF ASTARAC

Name Suffix:<NSFX> Count Of Astarnac

Name Suffix:<NSFX> Count Of Astarnac

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
